_comment: Golden INPUT for the §3.2.4 pinned HeadlineClusterer (§9.1). 22 headlines, deliberately NOT in published_at order (the algorithm must sort). Stories: A=RBI rate cut (h01+h02+h03 merge across 3 domains; h15 joins next day INSIDE the 2-day window; h14 is an IDENTICAL title 3 days later, OUTSIDE the window from A's last_seen -> new cluster). B=Infosys Q1 (h04+h05+h06; h05 duplicates h04's domain so distinct source_domains stays 2). C=Adani Ports (h08+h22 cross-day merge). D=greedy-earliest: h12 scores 0.685 vs h11 (< 0.75 -> own cluster), h13 scores >= 0.75 vs BOTH h11 and h12 representatives -> must join h11 (earliest first_seen), never h12. All other headlines are singletons (max cross-story similarity < 0.75).
